title: Ship vault_rotate orchestration + synthetic-check (sp001 follow-up)
description: sp001 closed with only task-1 deliverable (rotate_secret helper). Tasks wd0-242628-hcu.2 (vault_rotate.py orchestration with T+5min expiry) and wd0-242628-hcu.3 (synthetic-check hook asserting zero 5xx during rotation window) were audit-approved but their files (src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py, tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py) do not exist on disk. Acceptance criteria #2 (5-min overlap) and #3 (no 5xx in synthetic) of us003 are therefore not actually met in code. Either ship the missing orchestration + synthetic check as a follow-up, or supersede im002 with a new im### that records the reduced scope and reopen us003.

title: Make vault read timeout configurable (currently hardcoded 5000ms)
description: TODO surfaced during sp001 retro in src/lib/vault.py: set_timeout(timeout_ms) needs to become configurable — current default 5000ms is too short for the European region. Out of scope for the rotation work but worth tracking.
